_comment: Per-Digimon typing on the two axes of D-2 (US-087). types = by id (top tier, and every one of the 88 nodes in evolutions.json has one); lineDefaults = per evolution line, a safety net for a node added to a line later; keywordRules = ORDERED substrings matched case-insensitively against the id, first match wins, for the ~930 roster-only Digimon nobody has hand-typed. Anything still unmatched resolves to neutral/free, which is inert by design. Elements are this app's invention and are chosen for flavour, so they are consistent with the Digimon's authored attack in moves.json (Meramon throws flame -> fire) and need NOT be constant down a line: agumon fire -> greymon fire -> metalgreymon machine is correct, not a bug. ATTRIBUTES: canon where canon exists (Agumon/Greymon/WarGreymon/Andromon/HiAndromon/Garurumon/WereGarurumon Vaccine, Gabumon/MetalGarurumon/Palmon/Togemon/Lilimon/Rosemon/Patamon/Monochromon/Coelamon Data, Numemon/Tsukaimon/Ogremon/Bakemon/Etemon/Gazimon/DarkTyranomon/Devidramon/Nanomon/Mugendramon/MetalTyranomon Virus, MetalGreymon Vaccine). JUDGEMENT CALLS, not looked up: every Digitama and Baby (all typed free - an egg has no canon attribute, and their element is inherited from the line's theme); the Numemon/Scumon rubbish family beyond Numemon itself (geremon, gerbemon, scumon, goldnumemon, blackkingnumemon, platinumnumemon, greatkingscumon, karatsukinumemon - all read as virus); jyagamon, gokumon, digitamamon, shinmonzaemon, metaletemon, kingetemon, cyclomon, deltamon, extyranomon, raremon, tuskmon, vademon, psychemon, gizamon, boltmon, ebemon (virus); hyokomon, muchomon, centalmon, mojyamon, gaioumon (data); unimon, leomon, bancholeomon, piccolomon, gankoomon, raidenmon, darkdramon (vaccine - Darkdramon in particular is Vaccine despite the name, which is why it needs an explicit entry: the 'dark' keyword rule would otherwise type it dark/virus). Keyword-tier attributes are a genre heuristic, not canon: the angel families are vaccine and the devil/undead families virus because those two are consistent across the franchise; every other rule says free rather than fabricating an attribute for a whole family. KEYWORD ORDER IS THE COLLISION RESOLVER, and the first block of rules earns its place only that way: trice before ice (Triceramon is not an ice type), cherubimon before ice (_vice), orange before ange (Growmon Orange is not an angel), aquila before aqua, yuki before agu (YukiAgumon is the snow one), kaguya and raguel before agu, haguru before agu (Hagurumon is a gear). Six required rules - angel, machine, raidra, frigi, aqua, flame - currently match NO roster id and are kept because the story names them and the ids may yet be added.
